reason: Acceptance criteria checklist (6 items) — every PR must pass these before claim 'done'.
F1-F6 architectural decisions — verify implementation has not drifted (e.g. accidentally re-introducing stream-json parsing, or skipping --bare default).
Charter principles — verify MVP does not violate (no Next.js dep, no React, no headless browser, sync mechanism stays minimal).
Public-facing project goals — verify CLI behavior matches the documented MVP capability list.
Verify any ported file from ref/ has Apache-2.0 attribution header citing upstream path + commit.
Reference for license-compliance verification when reviewing ported code.
